mapper.select: WITH target_period AS ( SELECT evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate FROM batch_projection.evaluation_period_projection WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{evaluationPeriodId} ), deployment_scope AS ( SELECT DISTINCT wdp.employee_id AS employeeId, wdp.equipment_id AS equipmentId FROM batch_projection.worker_deployment_projection wdp JOIN target_period tp ON wdp.start_date <= tp.endDate AND (wdp.end_date IS NULL OR wdp.end_date >= tp.startDate) WHERE wdp.worker_deployment_role = 'PRIMARY' ), production_scope AS ( SELECT ds.employeeId AS employeeId, CASE WHEN COALESCE(mpr.lead_time_sec, 0) > 0 THEN 3600 / mpr.lead_time_sec ELSE NULL END AS productionSpeedScore FROM deployment_scope ds JOIN batch_projection.mes_production_result_projection mpr ON mpr.equipment_id = ds.equipmentId JOIN target_period tp ON DATE(mpr.start_time) BETWEEN tp.startDate AND tp.endDate WHERE COALESCE(mpr.input_qty, 0) > 0 ) SELECT employeeId, AVG(productionSpeedScore) AS productionSpeedScore FROM production_scope GROUP BY employeeId ORDER BY productionSpeedScore DESC, employeeId ASC
